tspan.tspan: Go to middle or desired text line
The “Adjustment” button will modify the subtitle
The settings can be used to modify,

text.tspan: Go to start or end of the subtitle text

tspan.tspan: The subtitle text can be modified directly,
via the settings or the find/replace feature.
The “Reparse” button will analyse the subtitle text

text.tspan: Delete the first or last line of the subtitle text
